title: Why Your Crush Doesn't Have a Crush on You?
original_title: Bakit Hindi Ka Crush ng Crush Mo?
overview: Sandy Veloso is a modern-day ugly duckling who is obsessed with her boyfriend. After being dumped by her beau, Sandy is left to ponder why she feels unwanted. Matters turn worse for Sandy when she gets laid off from the company she is working at.
